{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Billing, Assessments and Installments
Core Revenue Management Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
1,120
Total Hours
2
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Multi-Installment Ad-Hoc Obligations
Revenue officials require ability to create multiple payment obligation actions under ad-hoc obligations as installments, matching periodic obligation structure. This supports inheritance tax, legacy data migration, and guarantee processing with configurable rules for automatic installment generation.
02
Enhance Bill Segment Type Configuration

{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Billing, Assessments and Installments
Core Revenue Management Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
1,120
Total Hours
2
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Multi-Installment Payment Structures
Ad-hoc obligations currently support only single payments. This feature enables revenue officials to create multiple installment payment actions under ad-hoc obligations, mirroring periodic obligation functionality. Critical for inheritance tax, legacy migrations, and guarantee processing workflows.
02
Enhance Transfer Amount Configuration Flexibility

PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
4,580

10
Features
GRC
Requester

PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026

Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026

4,580
Total Hours
10
Features
GRC
Requester

4,580
Total Hours

10
Features

GRC
Requester

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.
Key Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling.
In Design 1,200h
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
In Progress 640h
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
In Progress 480h
Oracle 26ai Database Migration
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimisation, advanced analytics, and improved performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
To Do 420h
Cross-Team UI Tech Debt
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
In Progress 220h
Config Items Management Tool
Dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production without manual intervention.
In Design 380h

{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
BILLING, ASSESSMENTS AND INSTALLMENTS
CORE REVENUE MANAGEMENT CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
1120
Total Hours
2
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Multi-Installment Ad-Hoc Obligations
Support multiple payment actions under ad-hoc obligations with configurable installment rules and dynamic generation capabilities.
02
Enhance Bill Segment Type Configuration
Allow alternative target bill segment types in transfer amount processes to align with predefined configurations across revenue types.
03
Improve Payment Obligation Visibility
Provide comprehensive tracking of installment actions with searchable payment references and detailed status management for revenue officials.
Key Features
Add and Maintain Ad-hoc Obligations – Pay Instalment Actions and Categories
Enable revenue officials to create multiple payment obligation actions under ad-hoc obligations as installments with configurable categories and subtypes.
HLD821h
Transfer Amount - Enhancement on configuration of Bill segment types
Configure alternative target bill segment types in transfer amount processes to align with existing predefined bill segment configurations.
In Design299h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
PENALTY & INTEREST
CORE REVENUE MANAGEMENT CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
2,986.9
Total Hours
1
Features
GTM
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Complete Credit Interest Calculation Accuracy
Include unallocated payment segments in credit interest calculations to ensure taxpayers receive proper interest on all credit amounts.
02
Support Tax Account Implementations
Enable accurate interest calculation for tax account scenarios where liability amendments create unallocated payment segments requiring interest accrual.
03
Ensure Regulatory Compliance
Comply with tax authority requirements for fair interest treatment on taxpayer funds held by revenue authorities across all payment scenarios.
Key Features
Enhance Credit Interest Calculation to include unallocated payment segments
Update CREDIT_INT rule to calculate reimbursement interest on credit unallocated payment segments for accurate tax account interest calculations.
Waiting Analysis Approval 2987h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
REGISTRATION
CORE REVENUE MANAGEMENT CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
2,389.8
Total Hours
3
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Organizational Hierarchy Visualization
Provide graphical representation of organizational units and taxpayer hierarchies to improve visibility of structural relationships and dependencies.
02
Enhance Revenue Type Categorization
Add revenue domain and declaration mechanism fields to support GL decision table logic and improve revenue type classification for business processes.
03
Support Same-Day Registry Modifications
Allow multiple party detail changes on same date without uniqueness conflicts through enhanced validity period conditions and state management.
Key Features
Enhance Validity period conditions in Registry detail entities to support multiple modifications in the same date
Enable multiple party detail changes on same date with enhanced validity period conditions and state flags for uniqueness validation.
Waiting Analysis Approval 747h
View Organizational structure and taxpayers hierarchy structure – User / Part 2 of 2
Display graphical representation of organizational units and party hierarchies with search and assignment capabilities for revenue officials.
In Design 747h
More details availability in Revenue types, searching enhancements in Fts and RTs
Add revenue domain and declaration mechanism fields to revenue types with enhanced search capabilities for financial transaction processing.
HLD 896h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
TAX ACCOUNTS
CORE REVENUE MANAGEMENT CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
529.9
Total Hours
3
Features
GTM, GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Establish Tax Account Reference Implementation
Create complete VAT tax account configuration with reconciliation periods and financial transaction linking for demo and implementation readiness.
02
Support Tax Account Overview Reporting
Provide consolidated period-centric view of financial transactions with opening/closing balances and running balance calculations for revenue officers.
03
Enable Threshold-Based Processing
Introduce threshold amount field in revenue type registration to support automatic threshold determination rules for tax account implementations.
Key Features
Support Tax Account Overview Page in the Single Taxpayer Overview
Display consolidated tax account financial transactions by reconciliation period with opening/closing balances and running balance calculations.
In Design 396h
VAT Tax Account Reference Implementation
Configure VAT tax account with reconciliation periods, financial transaction linking, and balance management for demo and implementation use.
HLD 356h
Introduce a Threshold Amount Field in Revenue Type Registration to support Tax Account
Add optional threshold amount field to revenue type registration for automatic threshold determination rules in tax account scenarios.
Waiting Analysis Approval 54h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Taxpayer Accounting
Core Revenue Management Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
1,813.1
Total Hours
4
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Support High-Volume GL Decision Tables
Enable multi-sheet GL decision tables with split strategies and multiline rules to handle hundreds of special cases efficiently.
02
Enable Financial Events Under Org Units
Allow financial transaction logging under organizational units and claimants for offset vouchers and settlement transfers with third parties.
03
Provide GL Decision Customization
Enable configurators to override GL decision table mechanism with custom adapters without modifying core product code for non-standard requirements.
Key Features
Enable financial events logging under Org units and Claimants
Enable financial transaction logging under organizational units and claimants for offset vouchers and settlement transfers with third parties.
Waiting Analysis Approval 1,493h
GL decisions table - Ensure extensibility and high volume support of decisions /Functionality & Reference Implementation
Support extensibility of GL decision table with parameters controlling account splits across multiple files for high-volume decision lines.
Waiting Analysis Approval 160h
GL decisions table - Multiline rules and additional parameters /Functionality & Reference Implementation
Introduce multiline rules and additional parameters in GL decision tables to support claimant, revenue type, and segment type differentiation.
Waiting Analysis Approval 160h
Configurability of GL Decision Table - Be able to override by custom application
Enable configurators to bypass GL decision table mechanism with custom adapter without modifying core product code for non-standard requirements.
Waiting Analysis Approval [DATA MISSING]
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"}]}}}
